topIngredients.name: Benzoyl Peroxide 10%
topIngredients.benefit: Maximum OTC concentration that kills acne bacteria on contact

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Counteracts the drying effect of benzoyl peroxide

topIngredients.name: Cocamidopropyl Betaine
topIngredients.benefit: Gentle surfactant for effective but non-stripping foam

verdict: PanOxyl 10% is the most powerful OTC acne cleanser available. Dermatologist-recommended for moderate to severe acne. The high benzoyl peroxide concentration is highly effective but requires careful use to avoid bleaching fabrics.
